Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'LSP: {l.get\(\\"lsp\\",{}\).get\(\\"id\\",\\"?\\"\)} seq={l.get\(\\"seq-number\\",\\"?\\"\)} hostname={l.get\(\\"hostname\\",\\"?\\"\)} area={l.get\(\\"area-addr\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) for a in d.get\('areas',[]\) for l in a.get\('levels',[]\) if l.get\('lsp'\)]")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import ISISAttackApp; app=ISISAttackApp\(root\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); vals=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'iface' in vals and 'metric' in vals; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); vals2=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'metric' not in vals2 and 'priority' in vals2; print\('GUI test OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import ISISAttackApp; app=ISISAttackApp\(root\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); vals=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'metric' in vals; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); vals2=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'priority' in vals2; assert 'metric' not in vals2; print\('GUI test OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import ISISAttackApp; app=ISISAttackApp\(root\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); print\('OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import MainWindow; app=MainWindow\(\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); d=app._form.get_config_dict\(\); assert 'metric' in str\(d\) or 'metric' in d; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); d2=app._form.get_config_dict\(\); print\('route:', d\); print\('iih:', d2\); print\('OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import MainWindow; app=MainWindow\(\); [print\(f'{a}: {app._on_attack_select\(a\) or list\(app._form.get_config_dict\(\).keys\(\)\)}'\) for a in ['iih-inject','route-inject','max-seq','purge-lsp','overload-bit','fight-back','flood']]; root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import MainWindow; app=MainWindow\(\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); p=app._form.format_preview\(\); assert 'LSP ID' in p and 'Sequence' in p and 'Metric' in p; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); p2=app._form.format_preview\(\); assert 'IIH' in p2 and 'Priority' in p2; print\('Preview OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import MainWindow; app=MainWindow\(\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); print\(app._form.format_preview\(\)\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import MainWindow; app=MainWindow\(\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); p=app._form.format_preview\(\); assert 'L1 \(LSP\)' in p; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); p2=app._form.format_preview\(\); assert 'L1 \(IIH\)' in p2; print\('OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")
